ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a reminder that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance tomorrow from 2:00 AM to 4:00 AM UTC. During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable. Please plan your remote work accordingly.

If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the IT Helpdesk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund is Pending – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

We are pleased to inform you that your income tax refund for the fiscal year 2023 has been approved. The amount of $5,000.00 is pending disbursement to your registered bank account.

To release the funds, please verify your account details by clicking the link below:
<URL>

Failure to verify within 5 business days may result in delay or forfeiture of the refund.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
Official Email: <URL>
